mapper.select: SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, field_id, field_name, type, property_json, ui_type, created_time, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_field WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, field_id, field_name, type, property_json, ui_type, created_time, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_field WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND field_id = #{fieldId} AND del_flag = '0'

SELECT id, table_pk, app_token, table_id, field_id, field_name, type, property_json, ui_type, created_time, updated_time, del_flag FROM bitable_field WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bitable_field (table_pk, app_token, table_id, field_id, field_name, type, property_json, ui_type, created_time) VALUES (#{tablePk}, #{appToken}, #{tableId}, #{fieldId}, #{fieldName}, #{type}, #{propertyJson}, #{uiType}, #{createdTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM bitable_field WHERE app_token = #{appToken} AND table_id = #{tableId}
